given: eval judge reporting records failure reasons for optional should_find assertions even when the eval score passes

should_find.finding: failedJudgeReasons ignores required: false on an unmet should_find assertion, so createEvalResult can return score 1 while the rationale says an optional assertion failed

should_not_find: the use of arrays indexed by expectation order

notes.body: Regression seed from Warden code-review finding: optional should_find assertions were allowed to miss for score calculation but still appeared as failure reasons in eval reports.
